# Sample Note

This is a sample note with standard Markdown headers.

## First Section

Content of the first section with enough text to be meaningful.
This section discusses various topics and should remain intact as one chunk.

## Second Section

Content of the second section that is separate from the first.
This demonstrates that standard Markdown header splitting still works.

### Subsection

A subsection under the second section.
More detailed information goes here.

## Third Section

Final section with concluding remarks.
This wraps up the sample note.
